summary.what: Drop Dolt remote, document embedded JSONL transport in AGENTS.md
summary.why: Single sync channel removes the misread that triggered the previous agent to skip committing auto-staged JSONL — the remote was unused since 2026-04-29 and bd dolt push/pull no-op without one anyway
summary.how: Removed bd SQL remote (origin → git+ssh://...gorewood/timbers.git). Patched AGENTS.md sync-model bullet to call out embedded-only mode, told agents to commit bd 1.0.x's _type-prefixed JSONL rewrites without reverting, added a 'bd export | diff' drift-recovery recipe, dropped bd dolt push from session-close workflow.

notes: Root cause of the previous-agent confusion was a one-time bd 1.0.x JSONL schema flip already landed in commit a5a2546 (records gained _type discriminator and reordering). Their fresh export matched HEAD; they just didn't trust it. Verified correctness with bd export -o /tmp/x.jsonl && diff against .beads/issues.jsonl — identical. Considered keeping the remote 'just in case' but chose deletion: the gitignored .beads/dolt/ working DB plus the committed JSONL gives full reconstruction; a future Dolt remote can be re-added with one command if multi-machine federation is ever needed.
